dashboard.label: pfSense Detail
dashboard.description: Drill into filtered pfSense filterlog events.

search.query: `pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:filterlog | eval rule_origin_norm=coalesce(rule_origin,"unknown") | eval rule_origin_tok=if("$rule_origin$"="" OR "$rule_origin$"="*", "*", "$rule_origin$") | where rule_origin_tok="*" OR rule_origin_norm=rule_origin_tok | eval transport_norm=lower(coalesce(transport,vendor_transport)) | where isnotnull(transport_norm) AND transport_norm!="-" | stats count by transport_norm | sort - count

| inputlookup pfsense_application_protocols | stats count by app | sort app | eval app_value=lower(app), app_label=upper(app) | append [| makeresults | eval app_value="*", app_label="All"] | eval sort_key=if(app_value="*", "0", "1") | sort sort_key app_label | fields app_label app_value

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok_raw=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), app_tok=if(app_tok_raw="*", "*", replace(app_tok_raw, " \\(.*\\)$", "")) | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_display=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_display=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) | eval dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="" OR "$dest_port$"="*", "*", "$dest_port$") | eval dest_port_tok=if(dest_port_tok="*", "*", replace(dest_port_tok, "^(\d+).*$", "\1")) | where (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | timechart span=5m count

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok_raw=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), app_tok=if(app_tok_raw="*", "*", replace(app_tok_raw, " \\(.*\\)$", "")) | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_display=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_display=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) | eval dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="" OR "$dest_port$"="*", "*", "$dest_port$") | eval dest_port_tok=if(dest_port_tok="*", "*", replace(dest_port_tok, "^(\d+).*$", "\1")) | where (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | lookup pfsense_application_protocols dest_port as dest_port_norm transport as transport_norm OUTPUT app | `pfsense_port_labels` | eval port_label=if(isnotnull(app), dest_port_label." (".app.")", dest_port_label) | stats count by port_label | sort - count | head 10

`pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok_raw=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), app_tok=if(app_tok_raw="*", "*", replace(app_tok_raw, " \\(.*\\)$", "")) | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_display=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_display=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) | eval dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="" OR "$dest_port$"="*", "*", "$dest_port$") | eval dest_port_tok=if(dest_port_tok="*", "*", replace(dest_port_tok, "^(\d+).*$", "\1")) | where (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | where rule_origin_norm="user" | eval rule_label=coalesce(rule_name, rule) | stats count by rule_label, action_norm | eval action=case(action_norm="allowed","allow", action_norm="blocked","block", 1=1, action_norm) | fields rule_label action count | sort - count | head 10

panel.title: Raw Events (most recent 10, up to 100 total)

search.query: `pfsense_filterlog_base` | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), direction_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), transport_tok=if("$transport$"="", "*", "$transport$"), src_ip_tok=if("$src_ip$"="", "*", "$src_ip$"), dest_ip_tok=if("$dest_ip$"="", "*", "$dest_ip$"), app_tok_raw=if("$app$"="", "*", "$app$"), app_tok=if(app_tok_raw="*", "*", replace(app_tok_raw, " \\(.*\\)$", "")) | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (direction_tok="*" OR direction_norm=lower(direction_tok)) AND (transport_tok="*" OR transport_norm=lower(transport_tok)) AND (src_ip_tok="*" OR src_ip_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_host_norm=src_ip_tok OR src_display=src_ip_tok) AND (dest_ip_tok="*" OR dest_ip_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_host_norm=dest_ip_tok OR dest_display=dest_ip_tok) AND (app_tok="*" OR app_norm=lower(app_tok)) | eval dest_port_tok=if("$dest_port$"="" OR "$dest_port$"="*", "*", "$dest_port$") | eval dest_port_tok=if(dest_port_tok="*", "*", replace(dest_port_tok, "^(\d+).*$", "\1")) | where (dest_port_tok="*" OR tostring(dest_port_norm)=tostring(dest_port_tok)) | lookup pfsense_application_protocols dest_port as dest_port_norm transport as transport_norm OUTPUT app as app_lookup | eval action=case(action_norm="allowed","allow", action_norm="blocked","block", 1=1, action_norm), src_ip=src_display, dest_ip=dest_display, dest_port=dest_port_norm, app_protocol=app_norm, app_port=coalesce(app_lookup, "Unknown") | sort - _time | head 100 | table _time action direction transport src_ip dest_ip dest_port app_protocol app_port rule_name rule reason bytes
